titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the J.O. Wright and Company Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 3, 2020 at 07:02

did.abstract: Letters, bills, and receipts (mostly 1890-1910) to James Osborn Wright (d. 1920), importer and cataloger of fine prints and engravings; Robert Fridenberg; and others concerning orders for prints and engravings imported by the firm. Included also are some illustrative memorabilia, and an annotated catalogue.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Wright (James Osborn) and Company Papers. Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The J.O.Wright and Company records consist of approximately two hundred letters, bills, and receipts addressed to James Osborne Wright, Robert Fridenberg, and others, concerning orders for prints and engravings imported by J. O. Wright and Company of New York City. The materials have been arranged in alphabetical order, and an index to correspondents may be found at the end of this register. Also among the papers is an annotated catalogue, The Engraved Portraits of Washington, which ocntains laid-in notes and printed matter.
These papers were donated to Yale University in 1956 by J. V. Reed.

otherfindaid.head: Other Finding Aids
otherfindaid.p: For an index of correspondents with J.O Wright, please consult theCorrespondents Index.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

list.head: Register of Correspondents to J. O. Wright
list.item: Adee, David; 1 receipt; 1896
Arlent-Edwards, S.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1898
Andrews, William Loring, 1837-1920; 3 autograph letters signed; 1896-1897
Barlow, Peter Townsend; 1 autograph letter signed; 1894
Bliss, Tasker Howard, 1853--; 9 autograph letters signed; 1891
Bowen, Clarence W.; 1 typed letter signed; 1891
Butterfield, W.A.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1902
Casey, Joseph J.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1891
Cheney, Mary B.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1907
Cook, Clarence: 6 autograph letters signed; 1886-1895
Crane, N.C.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1895
Curtis, George Ticknor; 5 autograph letters signed; 1893
Cutter, Abram E.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1891
Daly, Augustin, 1838-1899; 13 autograph letters signed; 1884-1892
Daly, Joseph Francis, 1840-1916; 4 autograph letters signed; 1891-1892
Dix, Morgan, 1827-1908; 1 autograph letter signed; 1885
Eames, Wilberforce, 1855-1937; 6 autograph letters signed; 1885-1892
Evans, Charles, 1850-1935; 1 autograph letter signed; 1907
Gilder, Jeannette Leonard, 1849-1916; 4 autograph letters signed; 1889-1895

Guild, Curtis, 1827-1911; three autograph letters signed, 1889-1890
Gummere, Amelia Mott, 1859--; 1 autograph letter signed; 1906
Hall, R.; 1 receipt; 1907

James, Edward C.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1890
Johnson, T.; 1 bill; 1900

Osborn, Henry F.; 1 autograph letter signed; undated
Porter, George L.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1893
Richardson, Abby Sage, 1837-1900; 1 autograph letter signed; 1890
Rosenthal, Albert; 1 autograph letter signed, 1895
Sage, Dean; 16 autograph letters signed; 1885-1893
Serviss, Garrett Putnam, 1851-1929; 1 autograph letter signed; 1891
Sherborn, Charles William, 1831--; 1 autograph letter signed; 1894

Smith, Harry B.; 3 autograph letters signed; 1891-1893

Tuckerman, Bayard, 1855-1923; 1 autograph letter signed; 1885

list.head: Register to Robert Fridenburg (and others noted)
list.item: Arlent-Edwards, S.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1902
Barlow, Peter Townsend; 1 autograph letter signed, to George Ticknor Curtis; 1890
Broadley, Alexander Meyrick; 2 autograph letters signed; 1812
Campbell, John; 1 autograph letter signed, to Joseph Sabin; 1864
Cogswell, Joseph Green; 1 autograph letter signed, to Almon W. Griswold; 1865

Field, William B. Osgood; 6 autograph letters signed; 1916-1938

Graves, Henry, & Company; 1 typed letter signed, to Kennedy, Esquire; 1906
Griswold, Alline R.; 1 autograph letter signed; 1812
Hart, Charles Henry, 1847-1918; 2 autograph letters signed, to R. Fridenburg, to A.W. Griswold; 1908, 1866
Jaretzki, Alfred; 1 autograph letter signed; 1886

Robinson, W.; 10 autograph letters signed; 1914-1915
Stauffer, David McNeely, 1845-1914; 3 autograph letters signed; 1908 and 2 undated
Stephens, John Lloyd, 1805-1852; 1 autograph letter signed
Stewart, Alexander Turney, 1802-1876; 1 autograph letter signed, to Mrs. A.W. Griswold, 1859 October 6
Tenney, B.; 1 autograph letter signed, to gentlemen; 1900
Williamson, George Charles, 1858--; 6 autograph letters signed; 1912-1914
Yewell, George H.; 1 passport; 1867
Unidentified list of Richard Cosway's engravings prepared for R. Fridenburg

did.unittitle: Letters to Robert Fridenberg and others
Annotated catalogue, " The Engraved Portraits of Washington"; with loose material laid in
